text.title: Procurement Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the procurement-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: weights_before_bids
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Evaluation weights must be locked BEFORE bids open; post-bid reweighting is favoritism.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `weights-before-bids` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: sow_acceptance_criteria
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: SOW must contain measurable acceptance criteria per deliverable — never 'to PM satisfaction'.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `sow-acceptance-criteria` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: contract_type_justified
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Contract type (FFP / T&M / Cost+) must be justified per risk profile (FFP = scope known; T&M = scope volatile).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `contract-type-justified` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: conflict_of_interest_declared
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: All evaluators must declare COI before scoring; undeclared COI invalidates scoring.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `conflict-of-interest-declared` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: performance_monitored
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Vendor performance must be reviewed at least quarterly against SOW + scorecard.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `performance-monitored` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-procurement-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
